title: phryne tanacetifolia
intro: Phryne tanacetifolia, also known as the bushy tansy, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to Australia and is often found growing in dry, rocky areas. The medicinal properties of Phryne tanacetifolia include its ability to act as an antiseptic, antifungal, and antiviral agent, making it useful in treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Phryne tanacetifolia can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
